prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-WOODTIPSSOLDERINGTWEEZERS-40-UT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 40pc Beginner Pyrography Wood Burning Pen Kit with Soldering Tips Stencils and Hot Knife Tool Set for DIY Crafts Engraving Leather Burning and Hobby Projects Description: Add creative detail and personalized designs to your next DIY project with this complete 40pc Wood Burning Pen and Soldering Tips Set, an all in one beginner friendly pyrography and crafting kit built for versatility, control, and ease of use. Designed for hobbyists, beginners, artists, and DIY enthusiasts, this starter pyrography kit includes a wood burning pen, carving tips, embossing tips, soldering tips, hot knife chuck and blade, plus number letter and symbol stencils to help you explore multiple techniques with one convenient tool set.

A starter pyrography or wood burning kit is ideal for beginners who want tools that feel safe, easy to handle, and versatile enough to practice shading, lettering, engraving, crafting, leather burning, and decorative art. Whether you are customizing wood signs, creating handmade gifts, upgrading home décor, or experimenting with craft hobbies, this multi purpose kit provides reliable performance for wood working projects, hobby crafting, home improvement tasks, and creative DIY applications.

Lightweight and easy to control, this beginner wood burning kit is perfect for adults, teens, and first time users looking for an affordable entry into pyrography art. Use it on wood, leather, cork, and other craft surfaces to add texture, detail, and artistic flare while expanding your creative skills. Search Terms: wood burning kit beginner pyrography starter kit cheap wood burner tool soldering pen kit craft burning tool diy wood burning pen set hobby wood burner leather burning kit engraving craft tool stencil wood burner art kit beginner craft supplies Features: - ALL IN ONE BEGINNER WOOD BURNING KIT Complete 40 piece pyrography starter set includes a wood burning pen, carving tips, embossing tips, soldering tips, hot knife blade and creative stencils so beginners can explore multiple techniques with one versatile tool - DESIGNED FOR BEGINNER HOBBYISTS: Easy to hold lightweight pen helps new users practice shading, lettering, engraving and decorative wood art while learning pyrography skills for DIY crafts, home décor and handmade gifts - MULTI PURPOSE CRAFTING AND SOLDERING TOOL: Ideal for wood burning, leather crafting, embossing, stencil art, hobby crafting, soldering projects and home improvement applications, giving artists and makers more creative flexibility - PERFECT FOR DIY PROJECTS AND CUSTOM ART: Create personalized signs, etched designs, decorative patterns and unique handmade creations on wood, cork, leather and craft surfaces, making this kit a great choice for beginners and casual creators - GREAT ENTRY LEVEL PYROGRAPHY SET: Affordable beginner friendly wood burning kit designed for students, hobby artists, makers and DIY enthusiasts looking for a complete starter tool set for creative projects and craft hobbies === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
